mission.title: flux: kustomize v4 high-impact breaking changes
mission.description: kustomize v4 high-impact breaking changes. This issue affects 17+ users.

steps.title: Identify flux upgrade symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your flux deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=flux
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `accumulating resources: accumulation err='accumulating resources from '../bases/source-controller': '/private/var/folder`

steps.title: Check current resource configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant flux resources:
```bash
kubectl get resource -A
kubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>
```
The latest release of [kustomize](https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kustomize/releases) comes with breaking changes that have a high impact on Flux users.

❗ **TLDR: Do not upgrade to v4, stay on v3.

steps.title: Apply the fix for kustomize v4 high-impact breaking changes
steps.description:
* Update kustomize flags name
* Remove --enable_kyamls flag that was removed in https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kustomize/pull/3589
```yaml
$ kustomize version 
{Version:kustomize/v4.0.1 GitCommit:516ff1fa56040adc0173ff6ece66350eb4ed78a9 BuildDate:2021-02-14T05:00:02+00:00 GoOs:darwin GoArch:amd64}

$ kustomize build github.com/fluxcd/flux2/manifests/install?ref=v0.8.0
Error: accumulating resources: accumulation err='accumulating resources from '../bases/source-controller': '/private/var/folders/bh/bp5hplld7g915wdvkt5w0y9w0000gn/T/kustomize-040141028/manifests/bases/source-controller' must resolve to a file': recursed accumulation of path '/private/var/folders/bh/bp5hplld7g915wdvkt5w0y9w0000gn/T/kustomize-040141028/manifests/b
```

steps.title: Confirm kustomize v4 high-impact breaking changes is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `accumulating resources: accumulation err='accumulating resources from '../bases/source-controller': '/private/var/folder` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary:
The root cause is: * Update kustomize flags name
* Remove --enable_kyamls flag that was removed in https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kustomize/pull/3589. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.
codeSnippets:
$ kustomize version 
{Version:kustomize/v4.0.1 GitCommit:516ff1fa56040adc0173ff6ece66350eb4ed78a9 BuildDate:2021-02-14T05:00:02+00:00 GoOs:darwin GoArch:amd64}

$ kustomize build github.com/fluxcd/flux2/manifests/install?ref=v0.8.0
Error: accumulating resources: accumulation err='accumulating resources from '../bases/source-controller': '/private/var/folders/bh/bp5hplld7g915wdvkt5w0y9w0000gn/T/kustomize-040141028/manifests/bases/source-controller' must resolve to a file': recursed accumulation of path '/private/var/folders/bh/bp5hplld7g915wdvkt5w0y9w0000gn/T/kustomize-040141028/manifests/bases/source-controller': accumulating resources: accumulation err='accumulating resources from 'https://github.com/fluxcd/source-controller/archive/v0.8.0.zip//source-controller-0.8.0/config/crd': yam

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with flux installed or the issue environment reproducible.
